context: Tests whether the agent records a new ADR that supersedes an existing one: it creates ADR 0003 in docs/adrs/ with the required MADR sections, marks ADR 0002 as Superseded-by-0003, leaves ADR 0001 untouched, and updates the README index (a new row plus 0002's status), preserving existing rows.

checklist.name: New ADR created with next number
checklist.description: A new file docs/adrs/0003-*.md is created — the next sequential number, zero-padded to four digits.

checklist.name: New ADR well-formed
checklist.description: The new ADR has a '# 0003. Title' header, 'Status' and 'Date' list items, and the four sections Context and drivers, Considered options, Decision, Consequences in that order.

checklist.name: Date not hardcoded
checklist.description: The new ADR's Date is today's date obtained at run time (e.g. via `date +%F`), not a guessed or placeholder date.

checklist.name: New decision references the superseded ADR
checklist.description: The new ADR's body (e.g. its Decision section) names ADR 0002 as the record it replaces.

checklist.name: 0002 marked superseded
checklist.description: ADR 0002's Status line is changed to 'Superseded-by-0003', referencing the new record's number.

checklist.name: 0002 content otherwise intact
checklist.description: Only ADR 0002's Status line changed; its existing sections and prose are not rewritten.

checklist.name: 0001 untouched
checklist.description: ADR 0001 is unchanged and still has Status Accepted.

checklist.name: README row added
checklist.description: The index gains a row linking 0003 to its file.

checklist.name: README reflects supersede
checklist.description: The index row for 0002 shows it is superseded (no longer plain Accepted).

checklist.name: Existing README rows preserved
checklist.description: The rows for 0001 and 0002 remain present (0001 unchanged).
